selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the first uncovered active `a2_state` parent after the already-reduced Stage-3 sendpack batch.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active ingest/promotion packet into a smaller controller-usable boundary set without rereading raw sources or touching active state files.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next `a2_state` sibling once ingest and promotion boundaries are narrowed.
Best direct work-surface follow-on once the upstream Stage-3 sendpack packet is reduced.
Best next active sibling after the remaining `a2_state` live-state family is handled.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate ingest heterogeneity, fail-closed rosetta behavior, promotion-contract claims, and mixed audit/debt signals needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: HETEROGENEOUS_INGEST_PACKET_LINEAGE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet family's mixed completeness states as controller-relevant information rather than noise.

candidate_items.name: FAIL_CLOSED_ROSETTA_ABSENCE_GATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's strongest anti-fabrication engineering rule into one controller-usable gate.

candidate_items.name: RUNNABLE_PROPOSAL_EDGE_LANE_TRIAGE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the current runnable floor and keeps proposal-side bridge work and fenced edge families from being flattened together.

candidate_items.name: SOURCE_BOUND_PROMOTION_AUDIT_ON_EXCLUDED_EVIDENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps promotion audits useful while blocking them from outranking the excluded evidence they summarize.

candidate_items.name: PASS_WITH_DEBT_NONCLOSURE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Retains the strongest mixed-state audit contradiction without collapsing PASS language into closure.

candidate_items.name: FULL_SURFACE_CLASSIFICATION_IS_CROSSCHECK_NOT_SUPERSEDER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the whole-tree audit as a classification cross-check without letting it replace prior source-bounded batching.

quarantined_items.name: INGEST_MEMORY_UPDATE_INTENT_AS_EXECUTED_ACTIVE_MUTATION_FACT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent documents intended downstream updates, but this lane remains intake-only and cannot treat them as present-tense mutation facts.

quarantined_items.name: ACTIVE_PROVEN_AS_CLOSED_REPO_WIDE_SUCCESS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The same packet family preserves saturation, helper residue, open issues, and unresolved blockers alongside active/proven and PASS language.

notes: This batch keeps ingest and promotion claims proposal-side and source-bound.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
